items.title: Mamdani’s ‘Trump-Proofing NYC’ Campaign Sets Up Fight With White House
items.description: The democratic socialist received more than 50% of votes, while former Governor Andrew Cuomo — who ran as an independent — got just over 40%.  Republican Curtis Sliwa managed about 7%.  For Mamdani to keep his campaign promises, he’ll require more money from the federal government — which provided over $7 billion in revenue for the city’s budget this year.

items.title: Home Depot small-town rival closes after 56 years
items.description: People who have never lived in a small town don't know what it's like to lose a business that has been part of the community for generations. The Northern California town where I grew up, for example, has an Ace Hardware that's been there since 1957. My late father, who never trusted ATMs or money ...

items.title: Home Depot (HD): Evaluating the Stock’s Valuation After Recent Modest Share Price Move
items.description: Home Depot (HD) has seen its stock move slightly higher today, trading up about 1% at last check. Investors appear to be assessing the company’s recent performance and considering broader market conditions impacting the retail sector. See our latest analysis for Home Depot. Home Depot's share price has edged up today, but zooming out, momentum has taken a breather compared to last year’s rally. items.title: November's Dog Of The Dow Ideal "Safer" Buy: Verizon
items.description: Verizon (VZ) stands out as the only Dow stock meeting the 'dogcatcher' ideal this month: annual dividends from $1K invested exceed its share price. Read the full analysis here.
